prompts.name: Stone Path
prompts.text: Add a stone path with uneven shapes, moss, dirt between stones, and natural grounding.

prompts.name: Wooden Fence
prompts.text: Add a wooden fence with grain, weathering, posts, and rural or garden atmosphere.

prompts.name: Lamp Posts
prompts.text: Add lamp posts with warm glow, metal detail, and believable street or park placement.

prompts.name: Park Benches
prompts.text: Add park benches with wood or metal texture, natural scale, and relaxed public-space detail.

prompts.name: Flower Beds
prompts.text: Add flower beds with layered blossoms, soil, leaves, and decorative garden structure.

prompts.name: Fallen Leaves
prompts.text: Add fallen leaves scattered naturally across paths, grass, or streets for seasonal texture.

prompts.name: Puddles
prompts.text: Add puddles with small ripples, reflections, and wet ground context.

prompts.name: Snow Tracks
prompts.text: Add footprints or tracks in snow with soft edges and natural placement.

prompts.name: Utility Poles
prompts.text: Add utility poles and wires for everyday town or street atmosphere.

prompts.name: Street Signs No Text
prompts.text: Add street signs as environmental shapes without readable text, preserving clean image output.

prompts.name: Market Stalls
prompts.text: Add market stalls with fabric awnings, goods, warm light, and controlled background activity.

prompts.name: Bridge Railing
prompts.text: Add bridge railings with perspective lines, metal or stone texture, and environmental depth.

prompts.name: Fountain Square
prompts.text: Add a public fountain square with water, stone, open space, and urban elegance.

prompts.name: Garden Arch
prompts.text: Add a garden arch with climbing plants, flowers, and romantic outdoor framing.

prompts.name: Distant Mountains
prompts.text: Add distant mountains with atmospheric haze, layered silhouettes, and grand outdoor scale.
